framework.label: Entry Assessment
framework.definition: First-touch placement — persona capture + concern discovery at the very start of the journey.
framework.purpose: Place a brand-new user: capture persona/cohort and surface the presenting concern so the right bank/flow is served.
framework.businessValue: Top-of-funnel conversion + correct routing; the only assessment every persona always meets.
framework.entryCriteria: New/anonymous session opened; no prior persona on capadex_user_profiles.
framework.completionCriteria: Persona + concern selected; IntroPhase progressive form valid.
framework.scoringMethod: Non-scored placement (selection + concern routing); feeds bank resolution.
framework.recommendationRules: Routes to the correct sub-persona question bank (resolveQuestionBank).

framework.label: Baseline Assessment
framework.definition: Initial level snapshot — the first scored run that establishes a reference point.
framework.purpose: Establish the user’s starting level so later runs can measure movement.
framework.businessValue: Anchors Progress/Outcome measurement; without a baseline, growth is unmeasurable.
framework.entryCriteria: Entry complete; first competency/EI/behaviour run begins.
framework.completionCriteria: First employability_scoring_runs row persisted for the subject.
framework.benchmarking: Cohort percentile where k≥k_min; else suppressed.
framework.interventionRules: Wellbeing/learning intervention triggers if signals warrant.
framework.outcomes: Baseline row referenced by Progress deltas.
framework.kpis: Baseline completion rate; baseline score distribution.

framework.label: Diagnostic Assessment
framework.definition: Concern / behaviour diagnosis — the deepest assessment surface (concern banks, signal analysis, clarity).
framework.purpose: Diagnose the presenting concern and the behavioural signals driving it; surface wellbeing flags.
framework.businessValue: Core differentiator — the diagnostic depth that drives interventions and trust.
framework.customerJourney: Curiosity→Insight; clarity loop resolves ambiguous signals.
framework.completionCriteria: Signals analysed; clarity resolved; concern→signal mapping produced.
framework.benchmarking: Concern-band stats (diagnostic, not a strength score).
framework.kpis: Concern coverage; clarity-resolution rate; intervention uptake.
framework.statusNote: Deepest surface. Concern-diagnostic ⟂ Behaviour-signal are distinct subjects (boundary documented, not merged).

framework.label: Behaviour Assessment
framework.definition: Behavioural signal patterns — timing/linguistic signals captured during the session (4-tier ontology).
framework.purpose: Measure behavioural traits/patterns (incl. personality-style surfaces) from real session signals.
framework.businessValue: Behavioural intelligence is the platform’s core IP; powers honesty/contradiction guards.
framework.outcomes: Signal trends fold into longitudinal/behaviour memory.
framework.statusNote: Personality folds in as a behavioural-trait surface — NOT a separate clinical personality test.

framework.label: Competency Assessment
framework.definition: Frameworked skill assessment — onto_*/competency_* genome with adaptive question bank.
framework.purpose: Measure frameworked competencies/skills against the ontology genome and Role-DNA.
framework.businessValue: The employability spine — drives readiness, matching, hiring and career planning.
framework.entryCriteria: Competency/Role-DNA assessment selected; adaptive bank served.
framework.completionCriteria: Competency scores persisted; level bands assigned.
framework.scoringMethod: Adaptive question bank + ai-competency-inference + role-DNA runtime.
framework.kpis: Competency coverage; level distribution; gap closure.
framework.statusNote: Skill/Psychometric/Leadership/Career fold in as competency domains/lenses. LBI (lbi_*) ⟂ Competency (onto_*) are two products by design — NOT merged.

framework.label: Learning Assessment
framework.definition: Knowledge/learning checks — curated coding MCQ, practice sets, learning-path checks.
framework.purpose: Verify knowledge acquisition through curated MCQ / practice items.
framework.businessValue: Closes the learn→prove loop; supports upskilling claims.
framework.benchmarking: Per-domain breakdown; no platform-wide norm yet.
framework.outcomes: Practice deltas (not yet systematically tied to outcomes).
framework.statusNote: Uneven across stages/personas; no-sandbox curated MCQ only. Coverage exists, learner back-half thin.

framework.label: Performance Assessment
framework.definition: Applied/role performance — role-DNA fit, talent match, interview intelligence, readiness.
framework.purpose: Measure applied performance / role fit and career readiness against real role demands.
framework.businessValue: Employer-side revenue surface; strongest applied-evidence assessment.
framework.entryCriteria: Role/job context present; candidate competency substrate available.
framework.kpis: Readiness distribution; match precision; hire conversion.
framework.statusNote: STRONG on the employer surface, thin on the learner back-half. Readiness/Career fold in here.

framework.label: Progress Assessment
framework.definition: Re-measure vs baseline — employability_scoring_runs deltas across sessions.
framework.purpose: Measure movement against the baseline over time.
framework.businessValue: Proves the product works; the basis of the growth narrative.
framework.entryCriteria: A baseline + at least one re-run exists for the subject.
framework.statusNote: Systematic re-measurement IMPLEMENTED via REUSE (no new engine): captureProgressionOutcome() appends a longitudinal snapshot per stage progression (ensure-at-least-one datapoint) and deltas are computed on READ from employability_scoring_runs + longitudinal_patterns. Coverage⟂Adoption — the capture hook is gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag; cohort movement stays k-gated; adoption (re-administered subjects) accrues as subjects re-run and is reported SEPARATELY (lifecycle-closure composer), never composited with Coverage.

framework.label: Exit Assessment
framework.definition: Stage/lifecycle exit gate — a re-administration of existing assessments at stage/lifecycle exit.
framework.purpose: Gate stage/lifecycle exit by re-administering existing assessments to confirm readiness to move on.
framework.businessValue: Completes the closed growth loop; turns the platform from measure-once to measure-and-confirm.
framework.entryCriteria: Subject reaches a stage-exit boundary (evidence-gated progression).
framework.scoringMethod: Re-administer baseline/competency at exit (NO new engine).
framework.statusNote: Close-the-loop exit hook IMPLEMENTED via REUSE (no new engine): getReassessmentSignal() surfaces exit eligibility on reaching canonical Mastery and captureProgressionOutcome() records a DISTINCT reached_mastery milestone in validation_loop_outcomes (ref_id capadex_mastery:*). The pass/fail readiness gate is supplied by evidence-gated progression. Coverage⟂Adoption — gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag; adoption is reported SEPARATELY (lifecycle-closure composer) and stays 0 until real non-demo Mastery progressions accrue; no dedicated frontend surface yet (signal exposed via the capadex routes).

framework.label: Continuous Assessment
framework.definition: Ongoing re-assessment — interval re-administration of existing assessments.
framework.purpose: Keep the picture current by re-administering existing assessments on an interval.
framework.businessValue: Sustains engagement + outcome evidence beyond the first measurement.
framework.entryCriteria: Interval/trigger reached for a returning subject.
framework.scoringMethod: Re-administer existing assessments on interval (NO new engine).
framework.statusNote: Interval re-administration IMPLEMENTED via REUSE (no new engine, no background cron — Replit has no scheduler): getReassessmentSignal() derives due-ness ON READ from the freshness window (REASSESSMENT_FRESHNESS_DAYS=180) over accrued longitudinal snapshots, and each returning re-run appends a new datapoint via captureProgressionOutcome(). The trigger is a derived freshness signal evaluated when the subject returns, NOT a server cron. Coverage⟂Adoption — gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag; adoption (returning re-runs) reported SEPARATELY (lifecycle-closure composer) and stays 0 until subjects re-engage.

crosswalk.note: Behavioural-trait surface; NOT a clinical personality test.
Delivery method (psychometric question bank / LBI) — folds into Behaviour/Competency, not a separate type.
Direct — systematic re-measurement now instrumented via the progression-capture hook (reuse).
Career fit spans Competency+Performance; canonical home = Performance.
Wellbeing flags via capadex-intervention-engine within Diagnostic.
Close-the-loop exit hook implemented via reuse (reached-Mastery eligibility + reached_mastery milestone capture); adoption-gated.
Interval re-administration via a derived freshness signal (reuse); no server cron; adoption-gated.

known_overlaps.rationale: Distinct subjects (overlap in input only); boundary documented in blueprint 04 dictionary.
Two products by design; merging would break the LBI student product.
Migration-in-progress; consolidation is breaking-risk → recommend + human approval, do NOT silently merge.
Flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated standalone adaptive runtime (different entry points).
Similar weighted scoring in different dirs; review for shared util — breaking-risk, recommend only.
Deprecated in favour of sdi_items / psychometric_question_bank; retire (archive) on approval, never delete blindly.

coverage.label: Diagnostic Assessment
coverage.statusNote: Deepest surface. Concern-diagnostic ⟂ Behaviour-signal are distinct subjects (boundary documented, not merged).

coverage.label: Behaviour Assessment
coverage.statusNote: Personality folds in as a behavioural-trait surface — NOT a separate clinical personality test.

gaps.title: Learning & learner-side Performance content breadth is uneven (employer-side strong)
gaps.evidence: Learning=PARTIAL (no-sandbox curated MCQ only, uneven across stages/personas); Performance=PARTIAL (strong employer surface, thin learner-facing surface). The CLOSE-THE-LOOP re-measurement (Progress/Exit/Continuous) is now instrumented via reuse — this residual is curated CONTENT breadth (human-authored), not missing engine wiring.
gaps.remediation: Extend curated MCQ/practice + learner-side performance surfaces; reuse exam-ready + role-DNA. Content task — never fabricate items.

gaps.title: competency-runtime ⟂ competency-runtime-v2 migration not consolidated
gaps.remediation: Plan a deliberate, flag-gated migration; recommend + human approval. Do NOT silently merge (breaking-risk).

gaps.title: spe-scoring-engine ⟂ caf/scoring-engine share weighted-scoring logic
gaps.evidence: KNOWN_OVERLAPS CONSOLIDATION_CANDIDATE; similar logic in different dirs.
gaps.remediation: Extract a shared scoring util on approval; recommend only.

gaps.title: lbi_questions_legacy deprecated table still present
gaps.remediation: Archive (retire) on approval; never delete blindly.

gaps.title: Government / Healthcare / Clinical-Psychology assessment verticals deferred
gaps.evidence: Persona expansion G-F6 non-clinical scaffold only; "not validated / not for clinical use".
gaps.remediation: Out of scope; boundary marker only. Requires domain validation before any clinical claim.

overlaps.rationale: Distinct subjects (overlap in input only); boundary documented in blueprint 04 dictionary.
Two products by design; merging would break the LBI student product.
Migration-in-progress; consolidation is breaking-risk → recommend + human approval, do NOT silently merge.
Flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated standalone adaptive runtime (different entry points).
Similar weighted scoring in different dirs; review for shared util — breaking-risk, recommend only.
Deprecated in favour of sdi_items / psychometric_question_bank; retire (archive) on approval, never delete blindly.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical framework; the FROZEN 10-type taxonomy STRUCTURE is unchanged — only per-type status moved as close-the-loop mechanisms were instrumented via REUSE (no new engine/table/DDL). The growth loop (Progress / Exit / Continuous) is now CODE-COMPLETE by RE-ADMINISTERING existing assessments through the progression-outcome-capture hook + read-derived freshness signal. What remains is ADOPTION, not engineering: the capture path is gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag and real re-administration/outcome volume is currently 0 (reported SEPARATELY by composeLifecycleClosure; null≠0). Learning + learner-side Performance retain a Medium CONTENT-breadth residual (human-authored, never fabricated). No Launch-Critical assessment gap. Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Outcome⟂Adoption never composited.

lifecycle_closure.note: ADOPTION axis only — exercise of the (reuse-instrumented) close-the-loop mechanisms. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. The capture hook is gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag, so non-zero adoption accrues only as real subjects re-administer.

persona_linkage.note: Persona⟂Outcome linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (null≠0). Coverage⟂Outcome⟂Confidence never composited.
